vision.visual_reason: Wide interior shot of a fine-dining room with white-clothed tables, black chairs, a wood-slatted ceiling, and a large oval light fixture; no people in focus, well-exposed.
Ivy-covered building facade with arched windows, outdoor patio seating with tables, chairs, umbrellas, and potted plants under bright daylight.
Narrow cobblestone street lined with outdoor café tables, black chairs, and large potted plants under string lights, showing the venue's exterior terrace in daylight.

Wide panoramic exterior view at twilight showing a modern cable-stayed bridge (Puente de la Mujer) illuminated in purple, with city skyline, lit buildings, a tall ship silhouette on the left, and water reflections under a gradient orange-to-purple sky.
Well-lit interior of a dining room with set tables, white tablecloths, rattan chairs, decorative floral murals, and ambient wall sconces conveying a warm, intimate atmosphere.
Nighttime exterior facade of a restaurant with illuminated entrance, visible interior through windows showing tables, chairs, and a chandelier, but a person is partially visible inside the doorway.
Well-lit dining interior with natural light through large windows, sheer curtains, set table with plates and glasses, modern chairs, and visible outdoor terrace.
Interior of a bar with checkered floor, wood-paneled bar, exposed ceiling pipes, mirror ball, hanging wine glasses, and wine bottles; clear view of the full space and seating layout.

Clear interior of a cafe/restaurant with orange and pink walls, neon signage, framed portraits, pendant lights, set tables with bench seating and wooden chairs, and decorative plants—cozy and inviting atmosphere.
Panoramic view of a restaurant interior with neatly set tables, white tablecloths, wine glasses, bottles, warm pendant lighting, and decorative antlers, conveying a cozy rustic ambiance.
Clear street-level view of an ornate historic building facade with a vertical 'PARRILLA EL MIRASOL' sign, large barred windows, and adjacent storefront, shot in daylight.
Well-lit restaurant interior with large windows, hanging plants, multiple set tables with white and burgundy linens, wooden chairs, and a visible bar area with wine display.
Clear interior view of a restaurant with exposed brick walls, industrial ceiling beams, concrete floor, wooden tables and chairs, industrial pendant lights, and visible patrons seated at tables.
Nighttime exterior shot of a restaurant facade with a prominent wooden 'EL TORDO' sign, red awning, and warm lantern lighting; interior kitchen and dining area visible through large windows.

Well-lit restaurant interior showing dining tables with white tablecloths, black chairs, exposed concrete ceiling, white brick walls, and a prominent wine rack display with bottles and hanging plants.
Wood-fired grill with glowing embers, hanging sausages, stacked firewood, brick wall, and sticker-covered stainless steel hood convey a strong rustic-industrial BBQ interior atmosphere.

Clear daytime exterior of a cafe named 'jakub' with brick facade, large arched windows, outdoor seating with red Coca-Cola umbrellas, wooden tables, and visible patrons — a strong establishing facade shot.
Well-lit interior lounge with bar counter, multiple seating arrangements, sofas, armchairs, lamps, and floor-to-ceiling windows; wide perspective showing full spatial layout.
Ornate interior with crystal chandeliers, tall arched windows with heavy drapery, and a fully-stocked wooden bar with bartenders and patrons, showcasing the venue's classic luxurious ambiance.
Clear exterior facade shot of 'La Caprichosa' restaurant showing the ornate signage, red double doors, brick wall, chalkboard sign, and partial interior view through the windows.

Evening exterior shot of a restaurant facade with black-and-white striped awning, fairy lights, beaded curtains, and visible interior diners through large windows, conveying a warm, intimate street-side dining atmosphere.

Clear interior view of a restaurant showing wooden tables, chairs, an open kitchen with a chef, a bar with staff and customers, distinctive green bottle chandelier, tiled floor, and wall-mounted TV. Industrial-rustic decor with warm lighting.

Clear exterior facade of 'La Justina' with yellow walls, wrought-iron details, awning with Coca-Cola logo, chalkboard menus advertising 'LOCRO' and 'EMPANADAS', and a glass entrance showing a seated patron inside.
Clear exterior facade of a Tudor-style building housing 'La Plazoleta Parrilla' restaurant, with visible signage, menu boards, and Argentine flag, shot in bright daylight.
Well-lit interior of a bistro featuring colorful Mondrian-style wall panels, wooden staircase with mural, and neatly set tables with chairs in red, white, and blue.
Overhead view of a spacious restaurant interior with open kitchen, exposed ductwork, weathered walls, wooden tables with place settings, and warm lighting, conveying an industrial-chic atmosphere.
Clear exterior facade of a white corner building with 'MAURE' signage, large windows, and outdoor tables with white tablecloths on the sidewalk under bright daylight.
Clear daytime exterior of a pink facade restaurant 'La Coquela' with visible signage, green shutters, and outdoor seating with branded umbrellas.
Well-lit interior showing a long wooden bar with hanging wine glasses, liquor shelves, pendant lights, and adjacent dining area — classic bar/restaurant hero shot.
Exterior facade of 'La Banda' restaurant with signage, chalkboard menus, and entrance; shows venue exterior clearly with good lighting, no prominent people or food focus.
Interior of a bar/restaurant with extensive shelving of wine bottles, vintage signage, framed photos, wooden doors, and small dining tables with place settings visible in the foreground.

Clear interior view of a grill restaurant showing bar area, wine bottle display, decorative wall plaques, pendant lights, and a set dining table with red napkins, conveying a warm and cozy atmosphere.
Clear exterior facade of 'Parrilla Sanabria' with dark painted wood paneling, exposed brick, large windows, wooden doors, and outdoor seating visible on sidewalk.

Clear exterior facade shot of 'Pentios' venue with prominent illuminated signage, dark painted facade with green architectural details, large windows revealing interior lighting, and outdoor seating visible.
Dimly lit upscale restaurant interior with tufted leather banquettes, sheepskin throws, set tables, ornate gold-framed mirrors, and geometric pendant lanterns casting warm candlelight.
Night exterior shot of a glass-fronted venue with warm interior lighting, tiled patio, and stacked chairs visible through windows, framed against a city high-rise.

Rustic dining interior with exposed brick walls, warm amber lighting, decorative bottles on a high shelf, hanging dried fish, and tables with red patterned runners, creating a cozy, well-composed atmosphere.
